description_long: This is a bolt-action rifle with a classic wooden stock and a long, blued steel barrel. The stock is robust and extends from the butt to the fore-end, providing a solid grip and traditional appearance. The receiver and bolt assembly are visible, with a trigger guard and trigger located beneath. Iron sights are mounted along the top of the barrel, with a front post and a rear notch for aiming. The magazine is internal, integrated into the underside of the receiver, and the rifle lacks any visible modern attachments or rails. The overall finish is matte, with the wood showing a dark brown hue and the metal components appearing black or dark gray.
description: A traditional bolt-action rifle with a wooden stock, long blued barrel, and iron sights. The design is classic, with a matte finish and no modern attachments.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the wooden stock, barrel, trigger, and iron sights.
description_view_1: Barrel-end view, highlighting the narrow profile and front sight post.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, displaying the stock, barrel, and receiver with similar features as view 0.
description_view_3: View from the buttstock, showing the slim profile and rear sight alignment.
